title: agrostis vulgaris var. divaricata
intro: Agrostis vulgaris var. divaricata, also known as bent or black bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Agrostis vulgaris var. divaricata include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations involving this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
